text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During lunch today, Air Groove comes over to
ask Mejiro Dober about essential oils.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: For headaches, lavender and bergamot are best.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I recommend you use them with a clay mask
before bed. It'll help you relax.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
A clay mask... Thanks. I'll give it a try. You're
even more knowledgeable than I heard you were.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? Who did you hear about me from?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Me, of course! I went an' told everyone how smart
you are, Dober!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Taiki?! But it's not as if I know that much about essential oils...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Don't be so modest! You know everythin' from
beauty care to healthy habits, study hacks, and
even sleeping tips!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Everyone needs to know how much learnin' ya
got!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I mean, it makes me happy to hear you say that,
but...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um... Excuse me? Dober, you know a lot about
essential oils, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...I know a little. How can I help you?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm actually asking on Spe's behalf. Her poor
stomach is always growling, and I was wondering
if there are oils that suppress hunger.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Suppress hunger? I've heard of ones that boost
appetite, but let's see... I suppose something
minty would help...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following this, countless students start consulting
Mejiro Dober about their troubles.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I never seem to get enough sleep. Are there any
essential oils that promote better sleep or
something?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I want one that keeps you wide awake! I know
someone who's dozing off all the time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Settle down, you two. You should both use some
geranium oil to help calm your nerves.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
For muscle pain, I recommend using a beeswax
cream mixed with lavender and tea tree oil.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Beeswax? Ooh, I wonder if the wax will have any
honey left on it? Sounds delicious!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It won't, so don't try to eat it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After having to deal with an endless stream of
queries, Mejiro Dober is exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Whew... I can finally take a break...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: N-not really. It's not that big of a deal.
choice_data_list:
So, why do you know so much about essential
oils anyway?

So, why do you know so much about essential
oils anyway?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thanks. I just hope I was able to help
everyone.
choice_data_list:
So, why do you know so much about essential
oils anyway?

So, why do you know so much about essential
oils anyway?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: No reason... I just needed to know.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I didn't plan on learning so much... It's just tough
to live without them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The aromas help me relax and forget about all
the bad stuff.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The aromas help me relax and forget about all
the bad stuff.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I learned about them in order to protect myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea there'd be such a demand for my
expertise.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Maybe I should learn even more...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What are you so happy about?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You think? Then maybe I will. It'd be nice to be
able to help others more.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What, do you have something you want to ask me
too?
choice_data_list: What essential oils do you usually use?
Could you recommend some oils to me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
By the way, if you have anything you'd like to
ask, I'd be glad to hear you out.
choice_data_list: What essential oils do you usually use?
Could you recommend some oils to me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what?! What does it matter to you?! Why do
you want to know?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What I use? Oh, I don't want to talk about myself.
It's embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wait, are you really that sad that I won't answer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wait, are you really that sad that I won't answer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I suppose I can tell you the shop I frequent...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: The staff there are pretty nice...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time later, I'm heading to the shop Mejiro
Dober recommended, when...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Oh. You.
choice_data_list: Are you going to the essential oils shop?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer! What a coincidence.
choice_data_list: Are you going to the essential oils shop?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I was looking to get some new oils.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You don't know anything about essential oils, do
you? I guess it wouldn't kill me to teach you a
little...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we go together since we're both here?
I'll help you pick some that suit your needs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober and I go to the shop together, and I
buy some nice essential oils there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober and I go to the shop together, and I
buy some nice essential oils there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You want my recommendations?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...You're horrible at managing your sleep schedule
and maintaining a balanced diet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You've been sleep-deprived because of work
lately, and I've been worried about whether
you're eating properly...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You should focus on fixing those fundamental
parts of your life first.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You should focus on fixing those fundamental
parts of your life first.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Something like sweet marjoram can help stabilize
your biorhythm...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And for that... I think you can use sweet marjoram
to help you relax.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But since you're always at your desk, I bet your
back is under a lot of pressure too. Eucalyptus
and rosemary might help with that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But since you're always at your desk, I bet your
back is under a lot of pressure too. Eucalyptus
and rosemary might help with that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I think it might be better if you try smelling
them yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You didn't understand anything I just said, did you? Sigh. Just go back to your office for now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Can you wait for me in your office? I'll bring you
some oils I have to sample.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time later, Mejiro Dober brings a massive
amount of essential oils to my office.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time later, Mejiro Dober brings a massive
amount of essential oils to my office.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
So? How's the eucalyptus? Doesn't it make you
feel like you're relaxing in a forest?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And this is the sweet marjoram. Do you feel your
body getting warmer and warmer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, here. Do you want to try smelling the Damask
rose? It's supposed to be extremely relaxing.
choice_data_list:
If I smell any more oils, I think I might fall
asleep...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You look like such a slob right now... It's fine if
you fall asleep or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That's good. These are supposed to help you
relax.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober keeps offering me different
essential oils to smell, and I end up having the
best nap of my life.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober keeps offering me different
essential oils to smell, and I end up having the
best nap of my life.
